languages.text: "Я получил{mf||а} ее от вашего человека в знак высшего доверия и явил{mf|ся|ась} предложить помощь".

traits.locale_text: "Я получил{mf||а} ее от вашего человека в знак высшего доверия и явил{mf|ся|ась} предложить помощь".

languages.text: "I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."
languages.original_text: "Я получил{mf||а} ее от вашего человека в знак высшего доверия и явил{mf|ся|ась} предложить помощь".

traits.locale_text: "I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."
"I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."
"I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."

languages.text: “这是你的特工告诉我的，代表绝对的信任，我这才前来相助。”
languages.original_text: "I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."

traits.locale_text: “这是你的特工告诉我的，代表绝对的信任，我这才前来相助。”

languages.text: « Votre agent m'a {mf|mis|mise} dans la confidence en gage d'entière confiance et je suis {mf|venu|venue} aussitôt pour vous offrir mon aide. »
languages.original_text: "I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."

traits.locale_text: « Votre agent m'a {mf|mis|mise} dans la confidence en gage d'entière confiance et je suis {mf|venu|venue} aussitôt pour vous offrir mon aide. »

languages.text: "Bu ifadeyi, yüce güvenin bir nişanesi olarak ajanından öğrendim ve yardımlarımı sunmaya geldim."
languages.original_text: "I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."

traits.locale_text: "Bu ifadeyi, yüce güvenin bir nişanesi olarak ajanından öğrendim ve yardımlarımı sunmaya geldim."

languages.text: «Su agente me lo entregó como muestra de confianza suprema y he venido aquí a ofrecer mi ayuda».
languages.original_text: "I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."

traits.locale_text: «Su agente me lo entregó como muestra de confianza suprema y he venido aquí a ofrecer mi ayuda».

languages.text: "Ich erhielt sie von Eurem Agenten als Zeichen des Vertrauens und bin hier, um meine Hilfe anzubieten."
languages.original_text: "I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."

traits.locale_text: "Ich erhielt sie von Eurem Agenten als Zeichen des Vertrauens und bin hier, um meine Hilfe anzubieten."

languages.text: 「あなたの代理人から最高のご信頼の証として受け取り、ここに助けを申しに参りました」
languages.original_text: "I received it from your agent as a token of supreme trust and came here to offer my assistance."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの代理人から最高のご信頼の証として受け取り、ここに助けを申しに参りました」
